textByHash.0772d44a584705b672bf33141126b017057ab61d: This cape marks me as someone who has mastered the art of sailing. Only those who are skilled enough and brave enough to face anything the seas throw at them are allowed to wear one.
textByHash.25999dfaeac4f59a127f11bb54d628674860ed9a: Suit yourself. The offer still stands.
textByHash.611863ebc07054360d3fb9940b4e266eae3dda23: Aye, you've earned that right. Unlike most of the rabble around here, you've actually put in the work to master the seas. However, a cape like this doesn't come for free. It will cost you 99,000 coins.
textByHash.653c1d1ebd00a04381973ce0ba816c9ac8ea7e3b: Here's a word of advice: Don't take things personally. I get a lot of wannabes bothering me and wanting to join my crew, but I'm not here to offer out cheap thrills.
textByHash.6a53bbb74ad4dfdca21c509a75a26ec729e98c5c: Aye, but a cape like this doesn't come for free. It will cost you 99,000 coins.
textByHash.6ac9dd0aa4d22ea68603f54aacd17852063f656e: Fine. This cape marks me as someone who has mastered the art of sailing. Only those who are skilled enough and brave enough to face anything the seas throw at them are allowed to wear one.
textByHash.93ec53085ebfbd933f17d1265388346b8630ae1e: Ah, you again. Do you need something?
textByHash.b89c1a602d9de12680c51489aaf4ae4253d14601: To enjoy a drink and not be bothered. Now, if you'll excuse me...
textByHash.e003cf7aefd60ae5a3e724d8323c6bf2fb0ace48: No. Now, if you'll excuse me...
textByHash.e15ea852119d4681a7b45700caed1347ed8a09ef: Then I will have to ask you to move on.
textByHash.f1deb2e2f8d87b3b33f81f9d098609962f9c1fe6: Aye. Apparently you're someone who mostly knows what they're doing when it comes to sailing. I find it's a rarity these days.
